_comment: FICTIONAL test fixture for the scenario suite (S2 'lightbulb company' contract). Lumen & Co is not a real brand. Obligation rows in the shape obligation-extract emits; includes one weekend roll-back case, one anchor+offset (net 30) case, and one Sunday usage-window case. Dates are ISO and chosen against the suite's pinned_today of 2026-09-15.

obligations.required_action: Deliver pendant lamp feature video to Lumen & Co
obligations.evidence_text: Creator delivers the pendant feature video by 2026-09-26.

obligations.required_action: Confirm Lumen & Co paid usage window has ended
